description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named cloud-compiler that can be triggered manually with inputs for apps to remove, whether to add apps with shared dependencies, and a firmware platform. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, checking out the repository with submodules and a deep fetch, setting up Python 3.9, then removing specified apps based on the inputs, building binaries with a custom ESP-IDF action, updating partition tables and ROM config, cleaning previous builds and sdkconfig, building binaries again with a newer ESP-IDF action, generating a flash script, archiving the binaries, and uploading them as an artifact.
